---
title: "Robust and Nimble Caribou and Landscape Modelling Using SpaDES"
author: 
  - "Eliot McIntire"
  - "Julie Turner"
description: "A 2 hour workshop focusing on learning robust approaches to building reuseable, reproducible workflows for Caribou habitat modeling and forecasting"
date: last-modified
image: https://besjournals.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/cms/asset/db13319c-88b4-4821-9eaa-a2e62364b399/mee314034-fig-0004-m.jpg
categories:
  - R
  - SpaDES Workshops
  - Training
comments: false
editor:
  markdown:
    wrap: 150
---

*Registration for this workshop is now closed*.

**Update**: links to presentation files have been added to the agenda.

If you missed it, but would like to attend a future workshop, please reach out to [Eliot](../bios/community/aaaeliot.qmd) or
[Julie](../bios/community/julie.qmd) so that we can add you to the wait list.

## Date: June 14, 2026

## Location: [North American Caribou Workshop](https://event.fourwaves.com/nacw2026/pages/3276a5bf-46ef-4f7a-a4e0-acf2b1ce5576)

-	Workshop: Robust and Nimble Caribou and Landscape Modelling Using SpaDES
-	Workshop leads: [Eliot McIntire](../bios/community/aaaeliot.qmd) and [Julie Turner](../bios/community/julie.qmd) (with on-site assistance from [Genèvieve Degré-Timmons](../bios/current/genevieve.qmd)). Please direct any questions related to the workshop subject and materials to the workshop lead(s). 
-	Venue: Explorer Hotel, Katimavik B
-	Date/Time: Monday, June 15, 13:30-15:30 or until finished


## Preparation

We will be discussing ideas around reproducibility and reusability in the first part. In the second part, we will have an opportunity to see and run an example using R. If you would like to run code on your laptop, you should have a recent [Rstudio](https://docs.posit.co/ide/user/#rstudio-ide-oss-downloads), or [Positron](https://positron.posit.co/install.html) installed, and at least [R 4.5.3 downloaded](https://cran.r-project.org/).

## Agenda


+-------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 1:30 - 2:30             | [Robust and Nimble Caribou and Landscape Modelling Using SpaDES - presentation](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1iSxGcCh-ZrrR-Px6rY2SK1yCgSvUknYB)     |
|                         |                                                                 |
|                         | Background publication to the nimble approach: [The PERFICT approach (McIntire et al 2022)](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/full/10.1111/ele.13994)  |
+-------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 2:30 - 3:30             | [Project with caribou RSF forecasting]({{< var book.rsfForecast >}})  |
+-------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
